name: Nicotinamide riboside in healthy middle-aged and older adults
summary: A randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled crossover trial testing whether nicotinamide riboside raises NAD metabolism and exploratory physiological endpoints in healthy middle-aged and older adults.
population: Healthy middle-aged and older adults aged 55 to 79 years

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for DNA Repair Enhancement and NAD and Redox Restoration because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers, function, and safety in Healthy middle-aged and older adults aged 55 to 79 years. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
